title: viburnum villosum var. glabrescens
intro: Viburnum villosum var. glabrescens is a plant species within the Adoxaceae family, commonly known as the woolly viburnum or Korean viburnum. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Viburnum villosum var. glabrescens include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in modern medicine.
